Create and manage fee schedules in advance, and automatically generate and send invoices according to the set timelines. The system sends automated reminders via email to parents who have outstanding fees, while those who have already paid are excluded from reminders. This streamlined approach reduces administrative workload, ensures accurate tracking of fee payments, and helps maintain a steady cash flow for your educational institution. By automating these processes, you can focus more on providing quality education and less on managing payments.","image":"https://9t9it.com/images/school-colleges/students.webp","imageAlt":"Fees","reversed":false}]
